clues.clue: This enthusiastic orange-striped feline insists Frosted Flakes are 'gr-r-reat!'
This green-suited Irish sprite guards the marshmallows in a General Mills charm cereal.
This frantic bird goes 'cuckoo' for a chocolate-puff cereal.
This nautical officer in a tricorn hat sells a crunchy sweetened-corn cereal.
An eternally denied rabbit is told this fruity cereal is 'for kids' only.
'Snap, Crackle, Pop' are the three elf mascots of this crispy rice cereal.
'Kid tested, mother approved' has long pitched this General Mills cereal.
'The Breakfast of Champions' is the boast of this athlete-endorsed wheat-flake cereal.
'Follow your nose' guides Toucan Sam to this Kellogg's fruity-ring cereal.
'They're magically delicious' describes the marshmallows in this Lucky charm cereal.
These ring-shaped oat pieces in a yellow box are pitched as heart-healthy.
These frosted, shredded-wheat pillows come in a 'bite size' version.
These sugar-dusted square pieces are hawked by mischievous cartoon bakers.
These pieces are shaped like the 26 characters of the alphabet.
These fruity pebble-shaped bits are tied to a Stone Age cartoon family.
Lucky Charms marshmallows famously include hearts, stars, clovers and these orange crescents.
A single Cheerio is shaped like this round letter of the alphabet.
Honeycomb cereal pieces have this six-sided geometric shape.
Cocoa Pebbles and Fruity Pebbles are licensed from this prehistoric cartoon clan.
Apple Jacks and Froot Loops are both shaped like this small circular form.
The Kellogg brothers created corn flakes in this Michigan 'Cereal City.'
This 'General' company, a Kellogg's rival, makes Cheerios and Lucky Charms.
A famously misleading Post cereal's name promises grapes and these tree seeds, yet contains neither.
Early breakfast cereals were promoted as health food by this Seventh-day religious movement.
Crunchy granola surged in popularity during this hippie counterculture decade.

final.clue: For decades, cereal boxes hid these small plastic surprises that kids would dig through the flakes to find.
